message:
fix(franken_evidence): validate chosen_expected_loss against expected_loss_by_action map

EvidenceLedger::validate() now checks that:
1. When expected_loss_by_action is populated, it contains the chosen action
2. chosen_expected_loss matches the mapped value for the chosen action

New validation errors:
- ChosenActionMissingExpectedLoss: action not in the loss map
- ChosenExpectedLossMismatch: chosen value disagrees with mapped value

export.rs:
- read_jsonl() now calls entry.is_valid() after deserialization, skipping
  entries that parse but fail schema validation (defense-in-depth)
- Test: read_jsonl_skips_parsed_but_invalid_entries

render.rs:
- Extract truncate_with_ellipsis() helper (char-aware truncation)
  replacing inline byte-slicing that could split multi-byte chars

comprehensive.rs:
- Fix test entries to match chosen action with expected_loss_by_action
  entries, satisfying the new validation invariant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
